summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Vedanth Clinic Appointment & Practice Management Application. Backend APIs fully functional, frontend pages load correctly with proper authentication, appointment booking workflow operational with minor UI issue.

ui_bugs.issue: Confirm booking button remains disabled even when all required fields are selected
ui_bugs.details: User can select doctor, date, and time slot, but confirm booking button stays disabled preventing appointment creation

integration_issues.issue: Get Started button may not properly navigate to functional login page
integration_issues.details: Direct /login access works fine, but Get Started flow may have navigation issues

passed_tests: Root API endpoint returns welcome message
Protected routes properly redirect unauthenticated users
Appointments page with search and filtering
Medical records and invoices pages accessible
User management properly restricted to admin users
Doctor selection and calendar components working
Time slot grid displays available slots
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix appointment booking confirmation button - investigate why button remains disabled when all required fields (doctor, date, time slot) are properly selected. This is blocking the complete appointment booking workflow.
